productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Brown Shoes
description: U.S. Polo Association products are authentic and officially sanctioned by the United States Polo Association, the governing body for the sport of polo in the United States since 1890. Wear these premium leather ankle-boots in cocoa brown with your denims and polo shirt, and accessorise with a matching leather strapped watch for that Classic American style.UpperLeather derby style upper with stitches in beige colour and embossed branding on side for maximum styleLace-up system with D-ring metal eyelets for a snug FitFabric lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dryCushioned footbed for all-day comfortPull loop for wearing easeOutsoleHerringbone lugs for enhanced tractionStacked heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
